about.title: Why We Built This
about.intro1: The business books that shaped the modern online economy — DotCom Secrets, Expert Secrets, Traffic Secrets, Copywriting Secrets, Launch, The Art and Business of Online Writing — are genuinely brilliant. The frameworks inside them work. The results they've produced are real.
about.intro2: The problem isn't the frameworks. The problem is the gap between understanding a framework and executing it on your specific business, for your specific customer, in your specific market.
about.intro3: Most people who read these books end up with better theory and the same results.
about.insightP1: AI has fundamentally changed what's possible for solo entrepreneurs and small teams. You can now load a world-class framework into a system prompt, describe your business, and have the AI apply that framework — specifically to your situation — in minutes.
about.insightP2: The AI Native Playbook Series was built to make that accessible. Not as a course. Not as a membership. As a practical PDF guide that closes the gap between framework and execution.
about.approach1Desc: Every guide is built on the original framework — not a paraphrase, not a summary. The AI systems apply the actual framework steps from the actual books.
about.approach2Desc: Generic AI advice is everywhere. Each guide is designed to produce strategies specific to your business, not a theoretical example.
about.approach3Desc: We don't measure success by whether you finish reading the guide. We measure it by whether you run your first AI-assisted strategy session within 5 days.
about.approach4Title: Works with the tools you already use
about.approach4Desc: No proprietary platform. No subscription. Every system prompt works with Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini — tools you likely already pay for.
about.frameworksIntro: The AI Native Playbook Series covers six books from four authors who collectively represent the most systematic approach to building online businesses documented anywhere:
about.stat4Label: Average Time to First Strategy Session
about.whyP1: There are hundreds of AI tools and thousands of business courses. We built something different: a bridge between the world's best business frameworks and the AI tools you already use.
about.whyP2: Each guide isn't a summary or a paraphrase — it's a complete AI implementation system that applies the original framework directly to your business. No extra platform. No subscription. Just a PDF, a system prompt, and your AI tool of choice.
about.whyP3: The result: strategies that used to require $5,000+ consultants are now accessible to any entrepreneur for $17 per guide — or $47 for all six.
about.whoP1: AI Native Playbook Series is published by NEWBIZSOFT, a team that builds AI-powered business tools for entrepreneurs and small teams.
about.whoP2: We believe the best business frameworks shouldn't sit unread on a shelf. They should be running — automatically, specifically, and measurably — on your business.

home.gapTitle: The Gap Between Understanding and Execution
home.gapSubtitle: You've invested time reading the best business books. DotCom Secrets. Expert Secrets. Traffic Secrets. Copywriting Secrets. Launch. The Art and Business of Online Writing.
home.withoutDesc: "Design a marketing funnel for my business." AI gives you a generic AIDA model explanation. Theoretically correct. Completely disconnected from your specific product, customer, and market. You still don't know what to actually build.
home.withoutResult: Generic. Textbook. Impossible to execute without guesswork.
home.withDesc: AI applies Russell Brunson's Value Ladder to your business: Lead magnet [Free PDF guide] → Tripwire [$27 intro course] → Core offer [Monthly membership] → Backend [1-on-1 coaching]...
home.gapBottom: AI is powerful. But without structure, it gives you different answers every time. A proven framework gives AI the structure to deliver consistent, actionable results for your business.
home.builtForSubtitle: Not another course to read and forget. These are implementation systems you run on day one.
home.audience1Desc: You've read the books but can't afford a $5K strategist. For $47, AI becomes your personal implementation consultant — applying world-class frameworks directly to your business.
home.audience2Desc: You know the frameworks but translating them into client strategies takes days. Cut execution from days to hours — and deliver better, more specific results.
home.audience3Desc: You need a funnel, copy, and a launch sequence — and you need them before next week. Get all three AI systems in one bundle, running in under an hour.
home.audience4Desc: You want an audience that pays. AI runs the Nicolas Cole framework on your content strategy — so you can focus on creating, not figuring out the system.

faq.q1: Do I need to have read the original books first?
faq.a1: No. Each guide includes the core framework concepts. But if you have read them, the AI system will feel like having a personal implementation coach who already knows the book inside out.
faq.q2: Which AI tools does this work with?
faq.a2: All system prompts work with Claude, ChatGPT (GPT-4 or above), and Gemini. Any current AI assistant with system prompt support.
faq.q3: How long does it take to see results?
faq.a3: Each book includes a 5-day quickstart. Most buyers run their first AI-assisted strategy session within 24 hours of purchase.
faq.q4: Is this a course or a PDF?
faq.a4: PDF guides — immediate download, no login, no platform. Each guide is A4 format, approximately 20 pages, designed to be used alongside your AI tool of choice.
faq.q5: Can I buy individual books instead of the bundle?
faq.a5: Yes. Each book is available individually at $17. The bundle saves ${saved} versus buying all six separately.
faq.q6: What if I only use one or two frameworks?
faq.a6: At ${price} for six books, even getting value from two books makes the bundle worth it. But most buyers report using all six within the first month.
faq.a7: A4 format, approximately 20 pages each. They include the framework explanation, step-by-step AI implementation guide, ready-to-use system prompts, and real case studies. No fluff — every page is actionable.
faq.q8: What if it doesn't work for my business?
faq.a8: Every purchase comes with a 7-day money-back guarantee. If the frameworks don't deliver value for your specific business, email us and we'll refund you immediately. No questions asked.
faq.q9: I'm not in the US — will this work for me?
faq.a9: Absolutely. The frameworks are universal business principles. They've been applied by entrepreneurs in 30+ countries. The AI systems work in any language — you can describe your business in your preferred language and get framework-driven output.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the AI Native Playbook Series — products, payment, downloads, refunds, and technical support.
faqPage.ctaDesc: Email us at contact@newbizsoft.com and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
faqPage.q1: What is the AI Native Playbook Series?
faqPage.a1: The AI Native Playbook Series is a collection of 6 PDF guides that turn world-class business frameworks — from Russell Brunson, Jim Edwards, Jeff Walker, and Nicolas Cole — into step-by-step AI-powered systems you can run on your specific business.
faqPage.a2: Vol.1: DotCom Secrets (Marketing Funnels), Vol.2: Expert Secrets (Brand Building), Vol.3: Traffic Secrets (Traffic Acquisition), Vol.4: Copywriting Secrets (AI Copywriting), Vol.5: Launch / Product Launch Formula (Product Launches), Vol.6: The Art and Business of Online Writing (Content Strategy).
faqPage.q3: Do I need to have read the original books first?
faqPage.a3: No. Each guide includes the core framework concepts. But if you have read them, the AI system will feel like having a personal implementation coach who already knows the book inside out.
faqPage.q4: Which AI tools does this work with?
faqPage.a4: All system prompts work with Claude, ChatGPT (GPT-4 or above), and Gemini. Any current AI assistant that supports system prompts or custom instructions.
faqPage.a5: A4 PDF format, approximately 20 pages each. They include the framework explanation, step-by-step AI implementation guide, ready-to-use system prompts, and real case studies. Every page is actionable.
faqPage.q6: How do I access the guides after purchase?
faqPage.a6: Immediately after payment, you'll receive a download link via email. No account creation required. You can also re-download anytime from your purchase confirmation email.
faqPage.q7: Can I buy individual books instead of the bundle?
faqPage.a7: Yes. Each book is available individually at $17. The complete bundle ($47) saves you $55 compared to buying all six separately.
faqPage.q8: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.a8: We accept all major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay through our payment processor Paddle. All transactions are encrypted and secure.
faqPage.q9: Are prices in USD? What about currency conversion?
faqPage.a9: Yes, all prices are listed in USD. Paddle automatically handles currency conversion at checkout, so you'll see the equivalent price in your local currency before confirming payment.
faqPage.q10: Do you offer bulk or team pricing?
faqPage.a10: For team purchases of 5+ licenses, contact us at contact@newbizsoft.com for a custom quote. We offer volume discounts for organizations.
faqPage.q11: Can I get an invoice or receipt?
faqPage.a11: Yes. Paddle automatically sends a receipt/invoice to your email after purchase. If you need a custom invoice with specific details (company name, tax ID), email us.
faqPage.a12: Every purchase comes with a 7-day money-back guarantee. If the frameworks don't deliver value for your specific business, email us at contact@newbizsoft.com and we'll refund you immediately. No questions asked.
faqPage.q13: How do I request a refund?
faqPage.a13: Simply email contact@newbizsoft.com within 7 days of purchase with your order number. We process refunds within 1-2 business days.
faqPage.q14: Can I get a refund on individual books?
faqPage.a14: Yes. The 7-day money-back guarantee applies to both individual books and the complete bundle.
faqPage.a15: You need a PDF reader (any device) and access to an AI tool like Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini. No special software or hardware required.
faqPage.q16: How long does it take to see results?
faqPage.a16: Each book includes a 5-day quickstart plan. Most buyers run their first AI-assisted strategy session within 24 hours of purchase and see actionable outputs immediately.
faqPage.q17: Can I customize the AI prompts for my industry?
faqPage.a17: Absolutely. The system prompts are designed to be customized — you describe your specific business, industry, target customer, and the AI tailors all output accordingly. That's the core value.
faqPage.a18: Yes. When we release updates (e.g., for new AI model capabilities), all existing buyers get free access to the updated versions via email.
faqPage.q19: I'm not in the US — will this work for me?
faqPage.a19: Absolutely. The frameworks are universal business principles applied by entrepreneurs in 30+ countries. The AI systems work in any language — describe your business in your preferred language and get framework-driven output.
faqPage.a20: Email us at contact@newbizsoft.com. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
